title: 12 Pcs Babys Breath Artificial Flowers, Gypsophila Real Touch Flowers for Wedding Party Home Garden Decoration
features: Note: the main picture is the effect for 24-36pcs, if you want the same effect, please order 2 packs or more.
Real touch feeling.Flower head is silica gel,plastic stem, white gypsophila flowers.
Wire wrapped with plastics is used for firmness and angle-adjustable in creating the stems.
Putting them in a porcelain pitcher vase and they make the whole room look gorgeous.
They will brighten up your life and creat more romantic atmosphere to your house,wedding and party.
Perfect gift to friends, families for wedding, party, anniversary, ceremony, home.
description: Product Description How to create a memorable wedding party? A symbol of pureness and innocence, Baby breaths bring romance,pure love to your most important moment in your life. Baby's breath is an inexpensive choice to include in your floral arrangements and decor. You can include it in a bridal flower crown,as a low key boutonniere for the groomsmen or to adorn your decor. Don't hesitate to order for making a romantic wedding party. Brighten up your life and creat more romantic atmosphere Our mission is to make home decorations simple, but beautiful and warm and romantic. Each of our gypsophila has been manually inspected to ensure that there are no problems before it can be packaged. The flower and leaves can be INSERTED. Transport in the process of easy extrusion deformation, after a little adjustment can be restored. There may be plastic smell the first time you open the package,it will dissipate soon. It can be adjusted according to the requirements of length: Need to be short, you can bend or pruning treatment; Need long, you can put newspapers, stones in non-transparent vases Since transport process may appear, flower leaf abscission , the flower and leaves can be INSERTED. Note: the main picture is the effect for 20-36pcs, if you want the same effect, please order 2-3 packs. Scenes:If you want to have a beautiful table arrangment, pls buy more than 2 lots. Baby's Breath Floral Arrangement Baby's breath is an inexpensive choice to include in your floral arrangements and decor.They can be mixed with different flowers to create new bouquet. Baby's Breath Gift Baby's breath is a symbol of pureness and innocence,Perfect gift to friends,lovers,families for wedding, party, anniversary, ceremony. Baby's Breath Wreath Make DIY baby's breath wreaths which can be used for aisle or reception decor.Hang a large wreath on the front door of the church, either end of a reception tent. Don't hesitate to order for making a romantic wedding party. Baby's Breath Centerpieces Fill a glass globe with baby's breath, then add this centerpiece to each long dining table at the reception. Paired with tall tapered candles and crystal glassware the end result is equal parts upscale and effortless. Make Your Flower Girl More Creative Make a small wreath to wear on hair.Flower girls will be very happy to have a gypsophila wreath.Make a creative heart-shaped wreath instead of a traditional flower basket,they'll enjoy carrying unique wreath and the photos are guaranteed to be adorable. Decorate Your Cake Flowers are the perfect decoration for wedding/birthday cakes of all kinds but baby's breath has the power to enhance both one-tier creations and extravagant concoctions.Use baby's breath to decorate each cake tier or as a garland around the base.
